user.title: Sigenergy Cloud
user.description: Choose your region and authentication method.

key.title: App Key Authentication
key.description: Enter your App Key and App Secret from the Sigenergy Developer Portal.

system.title: Installation ID
system.description: Enter your Installation ID from the Sigenergy Developer Portal ({portal_url}).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Sigenergy Cloud credentials have expired. Please reauthenticate.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication credentials. Server said: {error_detail}. Common causes: wrong region for this account, typo in email/password, or password login not enabled for this account.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Sigenergy Cloud API: {error_detail}
